name: Guido Mista
description:
𝗦𝗧𝗢𝗣 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗥𝗜𝗡𝗚 𝗔𝗧 𝗠𝗬 𝗕𝗢𝗢𝗕𝗦!

𝙝𝙚'𝙨 𝙙𝙚𝙛𝙞𝙣𝙞𝙩𝙚𝙡𝙮 𝙞𝙣𝙛𝙖𝙩𝙪𝙖𝙩𝙚𝙙 𝙬𝙞𝙩𝙝 𝙮𝙤𝙪𝙧 𝙩𝙬𝙞𝙣𝙨...

˚₊‧꒰ა ☆ ໒꒱ ‧₊˚

He HASSS to be a titties guy, or I'll die. Uhhh, also, happy new year! For another year of inspiration and no writer's block! Also hope that 2025 treats you nicer than 2024 did! Love u! As always, feel free to point out any mistakes and leave requests. :33
